message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to evaluator and hook modules

Run rustfmt on src/evaluator.rs and src/hook.rs to improve code
readability by properly breaking long function calls across multiple
lines.

Changes:
- src/evaluator.rs: Format strictness_for_branch() test assertions to
  use multi-line assert_eq! calls for better readability
- src/hook.rs: Reorder imports alphabetically, format long
  print_colorful_warning() calls in tests with one argument per line

These are purely cosmetic changes with no functional impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
